# Concept Kernel Protocol (CKP)
# https://conceptkernel.org

## What is this?
An open protocol for autonomous concept governance. Every entity is a Material Entity (BFO:0000040) with three independently-versioned loops mapped to Description Logic boxes: CK Loop → TBox (what CAN exist), TOOL Loop → RBox (how things RELATE), DATA Loop → ABox (what DOES exist).

## Current version
CKP v3.7 is the current specification. v3.6 is frozen and remains browseable; older versions (v3.5-alpha6, v3.5-alpha3, v3.4) are historical.

## Key pages (v3.7)
- Introduction: https://conceptkernel.org/v3.7/introduction
- Conformance & Terminology: https://conceptkernel.org/v3.7/conformance
- Three Loops as One System: https://conceptkernel.org/v3.7/three-loops
- CK Loop (Identity): https://conceptkernel.org/v3.7/ck-loop
- TOOL Loop (Capability): https://conceptkernel.org/v3.7/tool-loop
- DATA Loop (Knowledge): https://conceptkernel.org/v3.7/data-loop
- BFO 2020 Grounding: https://conceptkernel.org/v3.7/bfo-grounding
- Four-Layer Ontology Model: https://conceptkernel.org/v3.7/ontology-model
- NATS Transport & Topics: https://conceptkernel.org/v3.7/nats
- Message Envelope & Processing: https://conceptkernel.org/v3.7/message-envelope
- Loop Isolation: https://conceptkernel.org/v3.7/isolation
- Authentication: https://conceptkernel.org/v3.7/auth
- Namespace Security: https://conceptkernel.org/v3.7/namespace-security
- Edge Predicates: https://conceptkernel.org/v3.7/edges
- EXTENDS + CK.Claude: https://conceptkernel.org/v3.7/extends
- System Kernel Taxonomy: https://conceptkernel.org/v3.7/taxonomy
- CK.ComplianceCheck: https://conceptkernel.org/v3.7/compliance
- CK.Operator: https://conceptkernel.org/v3.7/operator
- CK.Project & Libraries (incl. .ckproject manifest): https://conceptkernel.org/v3.7/project
- ConceptKernel + CKProject CRDs: https://conceptkernel.org/v3.7/crd
- Evidence-Based Proof: https://conceptkernel.org/v3.7/proof
- Reconciliation & Logging: https://conceptkernel.org/v3.7/reconciliation
- Versioning (per-kernel repos, 3 sibling dirs): https://conceptkernel.org/v3.7/versioning
- CK.Consensus: https://conceptkernel.org/v3.7/consensus
- Task Engine: https://conceptkernel.org/v3.7/task-engine
- Ontological Graph: https://conceptkernel.org/v3.7/graph
- Sessions: https://conceptkernel.org/v3.7/sessions
- PROV-O Provenance: https://conceptkernel.org/v3.7/provenance
- Full Changelog: https://conceptkernel.org/v3.7/changelog

- Kernel Metadata: https://conceptkernel.org/ontology/v3.7/kernel-metadata.ttl

- Base Instances: https://conceptkernel.org/ontology/v3.7/base-instances.ttl
- Proof: https://conceptkernel.org/ontology/v3.7/proof.ttl
- RBAC: https://conceptkernel.org/ontology/v3.7/rbac.ttl
- Edges: https://conceptkernel.org/ontology/v3.7/edges.ttl
- Consensus: https://conceptkernel.org/ontology/v3.7/consensus.ttl
- Shapes (SHACL): https://conceptkernel.org/ontology/v3.7/shapes.ttl
- Index (JSON-LD): https://conceptkernel.org/ontology/v3.7/index.json

## Browse ontology interactively
- Interactive browser: https://conceptkernel.org/browse/
- By class: https://conceptkernel.org/browse/?class=Kernel
- By URN: https://conceptkernel.org/browse/?urn=ckp://Kernel#CK.Task:v1.0

## Namespace
- CKP: https://conceptkernel.org/ontology/v3.7/
- Prefix: @prefix ckp: <https://conceptkernel.org/ontology/v3.7/> .

## Grounding ontologies
- BFO 2020: http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/bfo.owl
- IAO: http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/iao.owl
- CCO: https://github.com/CommonCoreOntology/CommonCoreOntologies
- PROV-O: http://www.w3.org/ns/prov
- ValueFlows: https://w3id.org/valueflows

- v3.6 (frozen): https://conceptkernel.org/v3.6/introduction
